'''Sif-Uwana''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the individuals known as [[Sif-Uwani]] and was administered by the [[Sif-Uwana Council]]. The planet was controlled by [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] during the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]] but was eventually lost to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. At some point, the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's agent]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] visited the world.

==Description==
Sif-Uwana was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="FC" /> of the [[Sif-Uwana system/Legends|Sif-Uwana system]], within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Atlas" /> The individuals native to Sif-Uwana were called the [[Sif-Uwani]], known for their casual way to approach money and management. The world was ruled by the [[Sif-Uwana Council]], an organization composed only of Sif-Uwani.<ref name="FC" />

==History==
Eventually falling within the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]], Sif-Uwana was under [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] control during the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], but a few hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Fifth Alsakan Conflict]]s ended, the world fell within the Alsakan's opponents' grip, namely the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]].<ref name="EGW" />

By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the [[Scoundrel/Legends|thief]] [[Kels Turkhorn]], had acquired a certified Sif-Uwana [[credit voucher]].<ref name="Herdship Heist">{{JournalCite|15|The Great Herdship Heist}}</ref> At some point, the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], traveled to the planet for business reasons,<ref name="FC" /> under the orders of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the leader of the dominant [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] government, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> which also controlled the territory Sif-Uwana fell in. Around [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Talon Karrde]] posed as a Sif-Uwani chief purchasing agent of the Sif-Uwani Council, during [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] negatiations on the world [[Kaal/Legends|Kaal]], claiming that the Sif-Uwani Council wished to set up their own [[Farm/Legends|harvesting]] operations on the [[Unis Islands]].<ref name="KC">{{JournalCite|7|The Kaal Connection}}</ref> [[8 ABY/Legends|Two years later]], Karrde would pose again as the Sif-Uwani agent, during an investigation on the planet [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]].<ref name="FC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sif-Uwana was first mentioned in the [[1994]] [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[First Contact]]'', a short story published within [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1]].<ref name="FC" /> In [[2009]], the planet was mentioned in the reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], which placed it in grid square K-8.<ref name="Atlas" />
